steps.title: Identify the angle and its opposite and hypotenuse
steps.content:
Angle $x°$ is at the top left vertex. The right angle (marked with a small square) is at the bottom left. From angle $x°$:
  • The opposite side runs along the bottom: 63
  • The hypotenuse is the diagonal from top left to bottom right: 73

steps.title: Apply the sine ratio
steps.content:
Substituting into the sine ratio:
$$\sin(x°) = \frac{63}{73}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
